id: in the second half of the year
meaning: during July to December — the latter six months of the year
chineseMeaning: 在今年下半年；在年度后半段（7–12月）
pronunciation: /ɪn ðə sɛkənd hɑːf əv ðə jɪər/
anchorSentence: We plan to release the new feature in the second half of the year.
collocations: in the first half of the year
in the latter half of the year
by the end of the second half
notes: Always use the definite article: in the second half (not in second half). H2 is the common business shorthand. In the latter half of the year is more formal.
recallQuestions: 那只7月才走出冰箱开始开会的北极熊财务总监，对应哪个英文时间表达？
商务英语里 H2 是什么意思？
用 in the second half of the year 写一句和你的项目计划或学习目标有关的句子。
